Q07.全量Schema 无知识: SELECT k.ne_id, ne.ne_name, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY k.ne_id, ne.ne_name HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 80 ;
Q07.全量Schema 有知识: SELECT k.ne_id, ne.ne_name, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu FROM t_ne_perf_kpi k JOIN t_network_element ne ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE k.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY k.ne_id, ne.ne_name HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 80;
Q07.Schema Linking 无知识: SELECT ne_id, AVG(cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu FROM t_ne_perf_kpi WHERE collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24' HOUR AND cpu_usage_avg_pct IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ne_id HAVING AVG(cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 80 ;
Q07.Schema Linking 有知识: SELECT ne.ne_id, AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu FROM t_network_element ne JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON k.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE k.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24' HOUR GROUP BY ne.ne_id HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 80 ;
Q07.全量Schema + Few-shot: SELECT ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name, ne.vendor, ROUND(AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct), 2) AS avg_cpu_pct FROM t_network_element ne JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON ne.ne_id = k.ne_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 days' GROUP BY ne.ne_id, ne.ne_name, ne.vendor HAVING AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct) > 80 ORDER BY avg_cpu_pct DESC;

Q08.全量Schema 无知识: WITH gold_vpn AS ( SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.max_latency_ms FROM t_l3vpn_service v WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' ) SELECT gv.vpn_id, gv.vpn_name, gv.max_latency_ms AS sla_max_latency, t.tunnel_id, t.measured_latency_ms FROM gold_vpn gv JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', gv.vpn_id, '%') WHERE t.measured_latency_ms > gv.max_latency_ms ;
Q08.全量Schema 有知识: WITH latest_tunnel_kpi AS (SELECT tk.tunnel_id, tk.latency_avg_ms, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tk.tunnel_id ORDER BY tk.collect_time DESC) AS rn FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk) SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.service_level, v.max_latency_ms AS sla_latency, t.tunnel_id, t.tunnel_name, ltk.latency_avg_ms AS measured_latency FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%') JOIN latest_tunnel_kpi ltk ON t.tunnel_id = ltk.tunnel_id AND ltk.rn = 1 WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE' AND ltk.latency_avg_ms > v.max_latency_ms;
Q08.Schema Linking 无知识: SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, v.max_latency_ms, sk.collect_time FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON v.vpn_id = sk.vpn_id WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND COALESCE(sk.sla_latency_met, FALSE) = FALSE ;
Q08.Schema Linking 有知识:
WITH latest_sla AS (
  SELECT sk.vpn_id, sk.kpi_id, sk.collect_time, sk.sla_latency_met
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT vpn_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_ct
    FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
    GROUP BY vpn_id
  ) lk ON sk.vpn_id = lk.vpn_id AND sk.collect_time = lk.max_ct
)
SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, v.max_latency_ms
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
JOIN latest_sla ls ON ls.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD'
  AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND COALESCE(ls.sla_latency_met, FALSE) = FALSE ;
Q08.全量Schema + Few-shot: SELECT v.vpn_name, v.max_latency_ms AS sla_max_latency, t.tunnel_name, t.measured_latency_ms FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%') WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND t.measured_latency_ms > v.max_latency_ms ORDER BY t.measured_latency_ms DESC;
Q08.全量Schema + Few-shot + 知识:
WITH latest_kpi AS (
  SELECT tunnel_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_ct
  FROM t_tunnel_perf_kpi
  GROUP BY tunnel_id
)
SELECT v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, v.max_latency_ms AS sla_latency_ms,
       t.tunnel_name, tk.latency_avg_ms AS measured_latency_ms
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
JOIN t_vpn_pe_binding b ON v.vpn_id = b.vpn_id
JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%')
JOIN latest_kpi lk ON t.tunnel_id = lk.tunnel_id
JOIN t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk ON t.tunnel_id = tk.tunnel_id AND tk.collect_time = lk.max_ct
WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD'
  AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND tk.latency_avg_ms > v.max_latency_ms
ORDER BY tk.latency_avg_ms DESC;
Q08.全量Schema + Few-shot + 列知识: SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name, v.max_latency_ms AS sla_max_latency, tk.latency_avg_ms AS measured_latency, t.tunnel_name FROM t_l3vpn_service v JOIN t_tunnel t ON t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', v.vpn_id, '%') JOIN t_tunnel_perf_kpi tk ON t.tunnel_id = tk.tunnel_id WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD' AND tk.latency_avg_ms > v.max_latency_ms ORDER BY tk.latency_avg_ms DESC;

WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD'

  AND t.measured_latency_ms > v.max_latency_ms

WITH customer_fee AS (
  SELECT customer_id, customer_name,
    SUM(monthly_fee) AS total_fee
  FROM t_l3vpn_service
  WHERE service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD')
    AND admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
  GROUP BY customer_id, customer_name
),
fee_ranked AS (
  SELECT *, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_fee DESC) AS pct_rank
  FROM customer_fee
),
customer_sla AS (
  SELECT v.customer_id,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN COALESCE(sk.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = TRUE THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS compliance_rate
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi sk ON sk.vpn_id = v.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level IN ('PLATINUM', 'GOLD')
    AND v.admin_status = 'ACTIVE'
    AND sk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY
  GROUP BY v.customer_id
)

FROM fee_ranked fr
JOIN customer_sla cs ON cs.customer_id = fr.customer_id

Q14.全量Schema 无知识: WITH this_week AS ( SELECT i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name, AVG(COALESCE(k.in_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0) + COALESCE(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0)) / 2 AS avg_bw_pct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name ), last_week AS ( SELECT i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name, AVG(COALESCE(k.in_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0) + COALESCE(k.out_bandwidth_usage_pct, 0)) / 2 AS avg_bw_pct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k JOIN t_interface i ON k.if_id = i.if_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14' DAY AND k.collect_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY i.ne_id, s.site_id, s.site_name ), site_this AS ( SELECT site_id, site_name, AVG(avg_bw_pct) AS this_week_avg FROM this_week GROUP BY site_id, site_name ), site_last AS ( SELECT site_id, site_name, AVG(avg_bw_pct) AS last_week_avg FROM last_week GROUP BY site_id, site_name ) SELECT t.site_id, t.site_name, l.last_week_avg, t.this_week_avg, t.this_week_avg - l.last_week_avg AS growth_pct FROM site_this t JOIN site_last l ON t.site_id = l.site_id WHERE t.this_week_avg - l.last_week_avg > 20 ORDER BY growth_pct DESC ;
Q14.全量Schema 有知识: WITH bw_by_site_week AS (SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, CASE WHEN ipk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '7' DAY THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END AS week_bucket, AVG(ipk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ipk JOIN t_network_element ne ON ipk.ne_id = ne.ne_id JOIN t_site s ON ne.site_id = s.site_id WHERE ipk.collect_time >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '14' DAY GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name, week_bucket) SELECT t.site_id, t.site_name, l.avg_bw AS last_week_avg, t.avg_bw AS this_week_avg, t.avg_bw - l.avg_bw AS growth FROM bw_by_site_week t JOIN bw_by_site_week l ON t.site_id = l.site_id AND t.week_bucket = 'THIS' AND l.week_bucket = 'LAST' WHERE t.avg_bw - l.avg_bw > 20;
Q14.Schema Linking 无知识: WITH this_week AS (SELECT ne.site_id, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM t_interface_perf_kpi kpi JOIN t_network_element ne ON kpi.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE kpi.collect_time >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) GROUP BY ne.site_id), last_week AS (SELECT ne.site_id, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM t_interface_perf_kpi kpi JOIN t_network_element ne ON kpi.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE kpi.collect_time >= DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) - INTERVAL '7' DAY AND kpi.collect_time < DATE_TRUNC('week', NOW()) GROUP BY ne.site_id) SELECT tw.site_id FROM this_week tw JOIN last_week lw ON tw.site_id = lw.site_id ;
Q14.Schema Linking 有知识:
WITH weekly AS (
  SELECT ne.site_id,
    CASE WHEN ik.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END AS week_bucket,
    AVG(ik.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_usage
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ik
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON ne.ne_id = ik.ne_id
  WHERE ik.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
  GROUP BY ne.site_id, CASE WHEN ik.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN 'THIS' ELSE 'LAST' END
)
SELECT tw.site_id, lw.avg_usage AS last_week_avg, tw.avg_usage AS this_week_avg,
  tw.avg_usage - lw.avg_usage AS growth
FROM weekly tw
JOIN weekly lw ON tw.site_id = lw.site_id AND tw.week_bucket = 'THIS' AND lw.week_bucket = 'LAST'
WHERE tw.avg_usage - lw.avg_usage > 20 ;
Q14.全量Schema + Few-shot:
WITH this_week AS (
  SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name,
    ROUND(AVG((kpi.in_bandwidth_usage_pct + kpi.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) / 2), 2) AS avg_bw_pct
  FROM t_site s
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON s.site_id = ne.site_id
  JOIN t_interface i ON ne.ne_id = i.ne_id
  JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi kpi ON i.if_id = kpi.if_id
  WHERE i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL'
    AND kpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name
),
last_week AS (
  SELECT s.site_id,
    ROUND(AVG((kpi.in_bandwidth_usage_pct + kpi.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) / 2), 2) AS avg_bw_pct
  FROM t_site s
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON s.site_id = ne.site_id
  JOIN t_interface i ON ne.ne_id = i.ne_id
  JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi kpi ON i.if_id = kpi.if_id
  WHERE i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL'
    AND kpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
    AND kpi.collect_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY s.site_id
)
SELECT tw.site_name, lw.avg_bw_pct AS last_week_pct, tw.avg_bw_pct AS this_week_pct,
  ROUND(tw.avg_bw_pct - lw.avg_bw_pct, 2) AS increase_pct
FROM this_week tw
JOIN last_week lw ON tw.site_id = lw.site_id
WHERE tw.avg_bw_pct - lw.avg_bw_pct > 20
ORDER BY increase_pct DESC;
Q14.全量Schema + Few-shot + 知识:
WITH bw_by_week AS (
  SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN kpi.collect_time < CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN kpi.out_bandwidth_usage_pct END), 2) AS last_week_avg,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN kpi.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 7 THEN kpi.out_bandwidth_usage_pct END), 2) AS this_week_avg
  FROM t_site s
  JOIN t_network_element ne ON s.site_id = ne.site_id
  JOIN t_interface i ON ne.ne_id = i.ne_id
  JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi kpi ON i.if_id = kpi.if_id
  WHERE i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL'
    AND kpi.collect_time >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
  GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name
)
SELECT site_name, last_week_avg, this_week_avg,
  ROUND(this_week_avg - last_week_avg, 2) AS growth_pct
FROM bw_by_week
WHERE this_week_avg - last_week_avg > 20
ORDER BY growth_pct DESC;
Q14.全量Schema + Few-shot + 列知识: WITH weekly_avg AS ( SELECT ne.site_id, CASE WHEN kpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND kpi.collect_time < NOW() THEN 'this_week' WHEN kpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND kpi.collect_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 'last_week' END AS week_label, AVG(GREATEST(kpi.in_bandwidth_usage_pct, kpi.out_bandwidth_usage_pct)) AS avg_bw_pct FROM t_interface_perf_kpi kpi JOIN t_interface i ON kpi.if_id = i.if_id JOIN t_network_element ne ON i.ne_id = ne.ne_id WHERE i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL' AND kpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' GROUP BY ne.site_id, week_label ) SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, ROUND(tw.avg_bw_pct, 2) AS this_week_avg_pct, ROUND(lw.avg_bw_pct, 2) AS last_week_avg_pct, ROUND(tw.avg_bw_pct - lw.avg_bw_pct, 2) AS increase_pct FROM weekly_avg tw JOIN weekly_avg lw ON tw.site_id = lw.site_id AND tw.week_label = 'this_week' AND lw.week_label = 'last_week' JOIN t_site s ON tw.site_id = s.site_id WHERE tw.avg_bw_pct - lw.avg_bw_pct > 20 ORDER BY increase_pct DESC;
Q14.全量Schema + Few-shot(43) + 领域约定:

  JOIN t_interface i ON ne.ne_id = i.ne_id

    AND i.if_type = 'PHYSICAL'
  GROUP BY s.site_id
)

WITH latest_kpi AS (
  SELECT vpn_id,
    CASE WHEN BOOL_AND(sla_latency_met) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END AS latency_score,
    CASE WHEN BOOL_AND(sla_jitter_met) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END AS jitter_score,
    CASE WHEN BOOL_AND(sla_loss_met) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END AS loss_score,
    CASE WHEN BOOL_AND(sla_availability_met) THEN 25 ELSE 0 END AS avail_score
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi
  WHERE collect_time = (SELECT MAX(collect_time) FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi)
  GROUP BY vpn_id
)
SELECT v.vpn_name, v.customer_name,
  lk.latency_score, lk.jitter_score, lk.loss_score, lk.avail_score,
  (lk.latency_score + lk.jitter_score + lk.loss_score + lk.avail_score) AS health_score
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
JOIN latest_kpi lk ON v.vpn_id = lk.vpn_id
WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD'
  AND (lk.latency_score + lk.jitter_score + lk.loss_score + lk.avail_score) < 75
ORDER BY health_score ASC;

Q15.全量Schema + DAIL Few-shot(TF-IDF+骨架多样性):
WITH vpn_health AS (
  SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN k.sla_latency_met = TRUE THEN 25.0 ELSE 0 END)
        + AVG(CASE WHEN k.sla_jitter_met = TRUE THEN 25.0 ELSE 0 END)
        + AVG(CASE WHEN k.sla_loss_met = TRUE THEN 25.0 ELSE 0 END)
        + AVG(CASE WHEN k.sla_availability_met = TRUE THEN 25.0 ELSE 0 END), 2) AS health_score
  FROM t_l3vpn_service v
  JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi k ON v.vpn_id = k.vpn_id
  WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD'
  GROUP BY v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name
)
SELECT vpn_id, vpn_name, customer_name, health_score
FROM vpn_health
WHERE health_score < 75
ORDER BY health_score ASC;
Q15.全量Schema + DAIL Few-shot(Embedding+骨架多样性:
SELECT v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN k.sla_latency_met = TRUE THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN k.sla_jitter_met = TRUE THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN k.sla_loss_met = TRUE THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN k.sla_availability_met = TRUE THEN 25 ELSE 0 END), 2) AS health_score
FROM t_l3vpn_service v
JOIN t_vpn_sla_kpi k ON v.vpn_id = k.vpn_id
WHERE v.service_level = 'GOLD'
GROUP BY v.vpn_id, v.vpn_name, v.customer_name
HAVING AVG(CASE WHEN k.sla_latency_met = TRUE THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN k.sla_jitter_met = TRUE THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN k.sla_loss_met = TRUE THEN 25 ELSE 0 END
    + CASE WHEN k.sla_availability_met = TRUE THEN 25 ELSE 0 END) < 75
ORDER BY health_score ASC;

  SELECT ik.if_id, ik.oper_status AS kpi_oper_status
  FROM t_interface_perf_kpi ik
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT if_id, MAX(collect_time) AS max_ct
    FROM t_interface_perf_kpi

  ) lk ON ik.if_id = lk.if_id AND ik.collect_time = lk.max_ct
)

FROM t_interface i
JOIN latest_kpi lk ON lk.if_id = i.if_id

  SELECT sk.*
  FROM t_vpn_sla_kpi sk
  INNER JOIN (

),

)

WHERE COALESCE(ls.sla_overall_met, FALSE) = FALSE
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM t_tunnel t
    JOIN latest_tunnel_kpi ltk ON ltk.tunnel_id = t.tunnel_id
    WHERE t.associated_vpn_ids LIKE CONCAT('%', ls.vpn_id, '%')
      AND COALESCE(ltk.sla_violation, FALSE) = FALSE
  ) ;

)

Q99.全量Schema + Few-shot: WITH site_cpu_mem AS ( SELECT ne.site_id, ROUND(AVG(k.cpu_usage_avg_pct), 2) AS avg_cpu, ROUND(AVG(k.memory_usage_avg_pct), 2) AS avg_mem FROM t_network_element ne JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi k ON ne.ne_id = k.ne_id WHERE k.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY ne.site_id ), site_if_bw AS ( SELECT ne.site_id, ROUND(AVG(kpi.out_bandwidth_usage_pct), 2) AS avg_out_bw FROM t_network_element ne JOIN t_interface i ON ne.ne_id = i.ne_id JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi kpi ON i.if_id = kpi.if_id WHERE kpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY ne.site_id ) SELECT s.site_name, s.city, scm.avg_cpu, scm.avg_mem, sib.avg_out_bw, ROUND(0.4 * scm.avg_cpu + 0.3 * scm.avg_mem + 0.3 * COALESCE(sib.avg_out_bw, 0), 2) AS pressure_index FROM t_site s JOIN site_cpu_mem scm ON s.site_id = scm.site_id LEFT JOIN site_if_bw sib ON s.site_id = sib.site_id ORDER BY pressure_index DESC LIMIT 10;
Q99.全量Schema + Few-shot + 知识: WITH ne_cpu_mem AS ( SELECT kpi.ne_id, AVG(kpi.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu, AVG(kpi.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem FROM t_ne_perf_kpi kpi WHERE kpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY kpi.ne_id ), ne_if_bw AS ( SELECT kpi.ne_id, AVG(kpi.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi kpi WHERE kpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY kpi.ne_id ), site_pressure AS ( SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, ROUND(0.4 * AVG(ncm.avg_cpu) + 0.3 * AVG(ncm.avg_mem) + 0.3 * AVG(nib.avg_out_bw), 2) AS pressure_index FROM t_site s JOIN t_network_element ne ON s.site_id = ne.site_id LEFT JOIN ne_cpu_mem ncm ON ne.ne_id = ncm.ne_id LEFT JOIN ne_if_bw nib ON ne.ne_id = nib.ne_id GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name ) SELECT site_id, site_name, pressure_index FROM site_pressure ORDER BY pressure_index DESC LIMIT 10;
Q99.全量Schema + Few-shot + 列知识:
WITH site_cpu_mem AS (
  SELECT ne.site_id,
         AVG(nk.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu,
         AVG(nk.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem
  FROM t_network_element ne
  JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi nk ON ne.ne_id = nk.ne_id
  WHERE nk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne.site_id
),
site_if_bw AS (
  SELECT ne.site_id,
         AVG(ik.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw
  FROM t_network_element ne
  JOIN t_interface i ON ne.ne_id = i.ne_id
  JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi ik ON i.if_id = ik.if_id
  WHERE ik.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne.site_id
)
SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, s.site_type, s.region, s.city, s.tier,
       ROUND(0.4 * COALESCE(cm.avg_cpu, 0) + 0.3 * COALESCE(cm.avg_mem, 0) + 0.3 * COALESCE(ib.avg_out_bw, 0), 2) AS pressure_index
FROM t_site s
LEFT JOIN site_cpu_mem cm ON s.site_id = cm.site_id
LEFT JOIN site_if_bw ib ON s.site_id = ib.site_id
ORDER BY pressure_index DESC
LIMIT 10;
Q99.全量Schema + Few-shot(43) + 领域约定:
WITH site_cpu_mem AS (
  SELECT ne.site_id,
         AVG(kpi.cpu_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_cpu,
         AVG(kpi.memory_usage_avg_pct) AS avg_mem
  FROM t_network_element ne
  JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi kpi ON ne.ne_id = kpi.ne_id
  WHERE kpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne.site_id
),
site_if_bw AS (
  SELECT ne.site_id,
         AVG(ikpi.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw
  FROM t_network_element ne
  JOIN t_interface i ON ne.ne_id = i.ne_id
  JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi ikpi ON i.if_id = ikpi.if_id
  WHERE ikpi.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  GROUP BY ne.site_id
)
SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name,
       ROUND(scm.avg_cpu, 2) AS avg_cpu_pct,
       ROUND(scm.avg_mem, 2) AS avg_mem_pct,
       ROUND(sib.avg_out_bw, 2) AS avg_out_bw_pct,
       ROUND(0.4 * scm.avg_cpu + 0.3 * scm.avg_mem + 0.3 * sib.avg_out_bw, 2) AS pressure_index
FROM t_site s
JOIN site_cpu_mem scm ON s.site_id = scm.site_id
JOIN site_if_bw sib ON s.site_id = sib.site_id
ORDER BY pressure_index DESC
LIMIT 10;
Q99.全量Schema + DAIL Few-shot(TF-IDF+骨架多样性): SELECT site_name, ROUND(pressure_index, 2) AS pressure_index FROM (SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, 0.4 * AVG(nk.cpu_usage_avg_pct) + 0.3 * AVG(nk.memory_usage_avg_pct) + 0.3 * ik.avg_out_bw AS pressure_index FROM t_site s JOIN t_network_element ne ON s.site_id = ne.site_id JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi nk ON ne.ne_id = nk.ne_id JOIN (SELECT ne2.site_id, AVG(k2.out_bandwidth_usage_pct) AS avg_out_bw FROM t_interface_perf_kpi k2 JOIN t_network_element ne2 ON k2.ne_id = ne2.ne_id GROUP BY ne2.site_id) ik ON s.site_id = ik.site_id GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name, ik.avg_out_bw) sub ORDER BY pressure_index DESC LIMIT 10;
Q99.全量Schema + DAIL Few-shot(Embedding+骨架多样性: WITH site_metrics AS ( SELECT s.site_id, s.site_name, ROUND(AVG(nk.cpu_usage_avg_pct), 2) AS avg_cpu, ROUND(AVG(nk.memory_usage_avg_pct), 2) AS avg_mem, ROUND(AVG(ipk.out_bandwidth_usage_pct), 2) AS avg_out_bw FROM t_site s JOIN t_network_element ne ON s.site_id = ne.site_id JOIN t_ne_perf_kpi nk ON ne.ne_id = nk.ne_id JOIN t_interface i ON ne.ne_id = i.ne_id JOIN t_interface_perf_kpi ipk ON i.if_id = ipk.if_id WHERE nk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND ipk.collect_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY s.site_id, s.site_name ) SELECT site_id, site_name, avg_cpu, avg_mem, avg_out_bw, ROUND(0.4 * avg_cpu + 0.3 * avg_mem + 0.3 * avg_out_bw, 2) AS pressure_index FROM site_metrics ORDER BY pressure_index DESC LIMIT 10;
